action_items.action: REVIEW GDCU-8847 VIP REV SHARE OPERATOR LIST — Still In Product (Nebojsa Stanic, updated today 13:19). THE ONLY remaining In Product ticket — all 5 other morning tickets (GDCU-8874, GDCU-8955, GDCU-8936, GDCU-8948, GDCU-8806) have cleared since Monday. UK feature: custom operator list for VIP users (level ≥2 via ktag/AdTech personalisation API). Acceptance criteria: VIP users see new operator list, non-VIP see regular list, filters and show-more work. Approve or return feedback today.

REVIEW T&C COPY — Ekaterina Smolinova (group DM with Dean Ryan, John O'Shea) sent updated Terms & Conditions copy at 13:20 today and asked: 'Let me know if you have any comments/questions.' No reply yet visible. Review and respond before EOD.

GDCU-8924 ORIGINS API NOW BLOCKED — NEW since morning. Nebojsa Stanic, priority=Blocked, status=In Progress (updated 12/05 14:42). Origins API DB replacement feedback items need implementing — doc in Pubtech Confluence space. ACs: publishes complete, no timeouts on multiple runs. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Dean Blackborough, Simon McLaughlin. Determine what is blocking Nebojsa and unblock today.

GROUP BETS — STILL UNCONFIRMED. Design was due Thursday 07/05 (5+ days ago). No update in Slack or Jira today. Miguel is now on WC Predictor (In Progress) and committed to sharing a prototype today/tomorrow morning. Before EOD: confirm with Miguel — is Group Bets design done? If yes → schedule KO call with Chloe + dev team immediately. If no → agree revised date and communicate 11 June impact to Chloe. (Carried from morning, still unresolved.)

SNAPCHAT LANDING PAGES — NEW TICKET GDCU-8987 (Chloe created today at 10:47). Ciara Carroll tagged Mike at 10:25 with detailed UX analysis on high bounce rates from Snapchat paid campaigns. Issues identified: (1) submit button sits above required consent checkbox — template-level bug across all form variants, (2) validation error renders off-screen on mobile, (3) no success confirmation shown after valid submission. Ciara and Chloe plan to discuss on AB test call next Tuesday. Review GDCU-8987 scope and confirm Ciara owns UX redesign.

GDCU-8432 GEO LOCATE GLOBAL HP IMAGES — HIGH priority, UNASSIGNED, To Do (updated today 09:00). Cross-functional ticket affecting IT, DE, RO, GR, NL, BE, DK, SE, ES, MX — geo-localise compare-casino and have-your-say phone images, hide YouTube watch-and-learn carousel for non-EN users. Mike is a listed stakeholder. Ticket still has no assignee after being re-touched today. Assign to a developer to unblock.

WC PREDICTOR — DESIGN ON TRACK, MONITOR PROTOTYPE DELIVERY. Mike had alignment call with Gab & Miguel this morning; GDCU-8935 moved to In Progress (10:20 today). Miguel committed in #gdc-wcpredictor: 'I will share a cleaned up version and prototype later today max tomorrow morning for the Devs to start having a look.' Spec now confirmed: two leaderboards (tournament-wide + knockout-only), tiebreaker for knockout = time of first goal in the final. Monitor Miguel's prototype delivery and confirm devs receive it.

MOBILE APP PIPELINE — Carlos organised two new tickets today: GDCU-8969 (Create app in GDC Trading Limited App Store Connect, Backlog, updated 11:18) and GDCU-8981 (Migrate Firebase project to apps@gdcgroup.com, Backlog, updated 11:18). Both depend on GDCU-8982 (bundle/package rename). Mike said 'I've got this thanks Carlos' at 11:04. Confirm sprint sequencing is clear: GDCU-8982 → GDCU-8981 → GDCU-8969 → GDCU-8809 (push notifications). Supersedes morning item on GDCU-8810 developer accounts.

WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN (GDCU-8392) — Ciara still on GDCU-8619 Operator List Redesign (In Progress). Confirm with Ciara: expected delivery date for GDCU-8619 so WC reskin can be sequenced. Hard deadline 11 June. Full scope: WC-themed symbols, animations, 3 audio tracks, background, frames, countdown clock, menu animation, banners. (Carried from morning.)

VIC DADSON — Day 22+ zero Slack activity (last seen 21/04). Return from sick leave was expected ~05/05. No contact today. This is now overdue to escalate — contact Colin Brannigan today and agree a cover plan for data engineering work. (Carried from morning, action overdue.)

COSMO SPINS ASSETS — Mike asked Josh Kerr & Shaun Cronin at 11:13 (group DM with Dean Ryan) for banner asset specs and dimension conventions so he can raise a ticket. Pending their reply — follow up if no response by EOD.
SEARCH ARROW BUG — Shane McGrath flagged a broken arrow in the search UI at 11:37 in #gdc-pod. Chloe asked Shane to raise a ticket. Verify ticket has been created and is assigned.
LIAM CAFFREY INTERVIEW — Confirm Wednesday 14/05 12–3pm interview slot with Liam and Gabriel. Check calendar and reply to Liam's DM if not already done today. (Carried from morning.)

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV] Display rev share operator list to users marked as VIP in ktag

UK market feature: custom revenue-share operator list for VIP users (ktag vip_level ≥2 via AdTech personalisation API or D1 database). Acceptance criteria: VIP users see new operator list, non-VIP see regular list, filters and show-more work. Stakeholders: Gabriel Cornoiu, Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Danilo Zdravkovic, Marcin Tazbir.

needs_input.summary: [GDC][DEV] Implement feedback for Origins API integration
needs_input.context: NEW since morning report — priority set to Blocked as of 12/05 14:42. Following the initial Origins API / DB replacement integration, a feedback document in Pubtech Confluence space lists items needing implementation. Acceptance criteria: publishes complete as expected, multiple sequential publishes without timeouts. Mike needs to identify what is blocking Nebojsa and remove the obstacle. Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Dean Blackborough, Simon McLaughlin.

GDCU-8874, GDCU-8955, GDCU-8936, GDCU-8948, GDCU-8806 have all cleared In Product (approved/merged/moved). GDCU-8810 developer accounts blocker superseded by structured tickets GDCU-8981 and GDCU-8969. GDCU-8924 newly Blocked since 12/05. GDCU-8432 (HIGH, unassigned) re-touched today with no owner. Completed today: GDCU-8957 Local Nav (Carlos), GDCU-8925 CWV changes (Novica), GDCU-8928 IUJ Banners (Jessica). GDCU-8935 WC Predictor moved to In Progress (Miguel). Sprint query returned 7 active/updated tickets.
_meta.slack_note: Active channels today: #gdc-product-design-pod (Snapchat landing page UX thread, Mike and Chloe tagged by Ciara — GDCU-8987 created), #gdc-pod (wheel slices DB issue fixed by Carlos, quick links hotfix merged by Novica, search arrow bug raised by Shane), #gdc-wcpredictor (spec alignment post-call, Miguel committed to prototype delivery today/tomorrow morning). Mike active in DMs: Miguel (WC Predictor calls), Carlos (app pipeline acknowledgement), Jessica (meeting invite — 'no obligation today'), David Mulero Pino ('talk tomorrow'). Group DM: Ekaterina Smolinova sent T&C copy at 13:20 — unresponded. Vic Dadson: Day 22+ silent, no change. No DMs from direct reports (Ciara, Jessica, Vic) today visible.
_meta.confluence_note: No GDCU space pages modified today (13/05/2026). CQL query returned 0 results.

Unresolved carries: Group Bets design confirmation (5+ days overdue), Vic Dadson escalation (Day 22+), Liam Caffrey interview confirmation, WC Cosmo sequencing with Ciara.
